Apply Now

Scale Your Blue Economy Startup

A 3-month intensive accelerator for BlueTech startups ready to grow. Mentorship, pilots, capital, and a global network.

Apply to Accelerator
Program

Program Overview

3 Months

Intensive Program

Hybrid

Remote + In-Person

Global

Open to All Geographies

Benefits

What You Get

Everything your BlueTech startup needs to achieve product-market fit and scale.

Dedicated Mentors

3-5 matched mentors with deep maritime and venture expertise.

Pilot Access

Direct connections to corporate partners for real-world pilot programs.

Investment

Funding support and investor introductions to fuel your growth.

Global Network

Access to our international ecosystem of partners and collaborators.

Journey

Your Timeline

From application to Demo Day — every step is designed for maximum impact.

Step 1

Apply

Submit your application and tell us about your venture.

Step 2

Selection

Interview process and cohort selection.

Step 3

Program

3-month intensive: validation, growth, investment readiness.

Step 4

Demo Day

Present to investors and industry leaders.

Ready to Scale?

Join the next cohort of Blue Economy innovators.
